Annuities for Retirement Security

Secure your financial future with annuities designed to provide guaranteed income, tax-deferred growth, and peace of mind in retirement. Explore fixed, variable, and indexed annuity options.

Get Personalized Annuity Quote View Current Annuity Rates Call (877) 717-7234

What are Annuities?

Annuities are financial products designed to provide a steady stream of income during retirement. They offer tax-deferred growth and can provide guaranteed income for life, making them an essential component of retirement planning.

Key Benefits:

  • Guaranteed income for life (with certain products)
  • Tax-deferred growth potential
  • Protection from market volatility (fixed annuities)
  • No contribution limits like 401(k)s or IRAs
  • Death benefit protection for beneficiaries
Get Annuity Quote

How Annuities Work

Accumulation Phase

You make premium payments that grow tax-deferred over time

Annuitization Phase

Convert your accumulated value into regular income payments

Income Phase

Receive guaranteed payments for a specified period or for life

Types of Annuities

Choose the right annuity type based on your risk tolerance, income needs, and retirement timeline.

Fixed Annuities

Guaranteed interest rate and predictable growth. Perfect for conservative investors who want stability and guaranteed returns.

Features:

  • • Guaranteed minimum interest rate
  • • Principal protection
  • • Predictable income payments
  • • No market risk
  • • Tax-deferred growth

Best For:

  • • Conservative investors
  • • Those seeking guaranteed returns
  • • Risk-averse retirees
  • • Stable income planning
Learn About Fixed Annuities

Variable Annuities

Investment options with potential for higher returns. Your account value fluctuates based on the performance of underlying investments.

Features:

  • • Investment sub-account options
  • • Potential for higher returns
  • • Professional money management
  • • Death benefit guarantees
  • • Optional living benefit riders

Best For:

  • • Growth-oriented investors
  • • Those comfortable with market risk
  • • Long-term retirement planning
  • • Seeking inflation protection
Learn About Variable Annuities

Indexed Annuities

Growth potential linked to market index performance with principal protection. Combines the safety of fixed annuities with growth potential.

Features:

  • • Principal protection guarantee
  • • Growth linked to market indices
  • • Participation rates and caps
  • • No direct market investment
  • • Minimum guaranteed returns

Best For:

  • • Moderate risk tolerance
  • • Seeking growth with protection
  • • Long-term accumulation
  • • Balanced approach to retirement
Learn About Indexed Annuities

Immediate vs. Deferred Annuities

Choose when you want to start receiving income payments based on your retirement timeline and current needs.

Immediate Annuities

Start receiving income payments immediately (within 12 months) after making your premium payment. Perfect for those already in retirement.

Key Features:

  • Income starts within 12 months
  • Guaranteed lifetime income options
  • Single premium payment
  • No accumulation phase

Ideal For:

  • • Current retirees needing income now
  • • Those with lump sum to invest
  • • Replacing pension income
  • • Immediate income needs

Deferred Annuities

Accumulate value over time before starting income payments. Ideal for those still working and planning for future retirement income.

Key Features:

  • Tax-deferred accumulation phase
  • Flexible premium payments
  • Choose when to start income
  • Longer growth potential

Ideal For:

  • • Pre-retirees still working
  • • Long-term retirement planning
  • • Building retirement income
  • • Tax-deferred growth seekers

Why Consider Annuities for Retirement?

Annuities offer unique benefits that can complement your overall retirement strategy and provide financial security.

Guaranteed Income

Create a personal pension with guaranteed income payments that can last for life, providing security in retirement.

Tax-Deferred Growth

Your money grows tax-deferred, meaning you don't pay taxes on gains until you withdraw, potentially allowing for faster accumulation.

No Contribution Limits

Unlike 401(k)s and IRAs, annuities have no annual contribution limits, allowing you to invest larger amounts for retirement.

Death Benefit Protection

Most annuities include death benefits that protect your beneficiaries, ensuring they receive at least your premium payments.

Inflation Protection

Many annuities offer cost-of-living adjustments or growth potential to help protect your purchasing power over time.

Asset Protection

In many states, annuities offer protection from creditors, helping safeguard your retirement assets from potential claims.

Optional Annuity Riders

Enhance your annuity with optional riders that provide additional benefits and protection for your specific needs.

Guaranteed Lifetime Withdrawal Benefit (GLWB)

Guarantees you can withdraw a certain percentage of your account value annually for life, regardless of market performance.

  • • Lifetime income guarantee
  • • Withdrawal flexibility
  • • Account value preservation
  • • Market upside participation

Enhanced Death Benefits

Provides additional death benefit protection beyond the standard account value, ensuring your beneficiaries receive more.

  • • Stepped-up death benefits
  • • Return of premium guarantees
  • • Beneficiary protection
  • • Legacy planning benefits

Long-Term Care Riders

Access your annuity value early if you need long-term care, providing financial support for healthcare expenses.

  • • Accelerated benefit access
  • • Long-term care coverage
  • • Healthcare expense support
  • • Dual-purpose planning

Return of Premium

Guarantees that your beneficiaries will receive at least the amount you paid in premiums, protecting your initial investment.

  • • Premium protection guarantee
  • • Beneficiary security
  • • Investment protection
  • • Peace of mind

Annuities vs. Other Retirement Options

Understanding how annuities compare to other retirement savings vehicles helps you make informed decisions.

Feature Annuities 401(k) IRA CDs
Contribution Limits None $23,000 (2024) $7,000 (2024) None
Tax Treatment Tax-deferred Tax-deferred Tax-deferred/Roth Taxable annually
Guaranteed Income Available No No No
Principal Protection Yes (fixed/indexed) No No Yes (FDIC)
Growth Potential Moderate to High High High Low
Liquidity Limited Limited (penalties) Limited (penalties) Limited (penalties)

Who Should Consider Annuities?

Annuities can be valuable for many people, but they're particularly beneficial in certain situations.

Annuities May Be Right If You:

Want Guaranteed Retirement Income

You're concerned about outliving your money and want guaranteed income for life.

Have Maxed Out Other Retirement Accounts

You've contributed the maximum to your 401(k) and IRA and want additional tax-deferred savings.

Are Risk-Averse

You want growth potential but can't afford to lose your principal investment.

Need Tax-Deferred Growth

You're in a high tax bracket and want to defer taxes until retirement.

Want to Leave a Legacy

You want to ensure your beneficiaries receive death benefits while you enjoy income.

Important Considerations

Before Purchasing an Annuity:

  • Understand surrender charges and withdrawal penalties
  • Review all fees and expenses carefully
  • Consider your liquidity needs
  • Evaluate the insurance company's financial strength
  • Understand how the product fits your overall retirement plan

Why Choose PCFG for Annuities?

Our experienced agents help you navigate the complex world of annuities to find the right solution for your retirement needs.

Expert Guidance

Our licensed agents have extensive experience with annuities and can help you understand your options.

Multiple Carriers

We work with top-rated insurance companies to offer you a wide selection of annuity products and rates.

Personalized Service

We take the time to understand your retirement goals and recommend annuities that align with your needs.
